creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
The patch has bit-rotted away, but the changes may still be relevant. The other NetHack-derived rogue games in the tree (e.g. SLASH'EM) are compiled with DLB, but that doesn't mean that NetHack must have it as well. In hindsight, there is not a huge benefit to cleaning up the data files.

This patch was submitted before the STAGE thing came about; in a STAGE-centric world it might be more important to store save files in /var instead of the default NetHack data directory.

That said I've lost interest in the patch; so long NetHack works I'll be happy.
